notes: imstalls and launches perfectly, once in game I had to disable Bloom or I got a white screen with hud, after that.. well.. it was better, I could see there was stuff, I couldn't see my character, the sky was white, there was a huge black segment of ground that kept expanding and moving, sometimes taking up the whole screen.. it's a mess, also no matter what I tried, I couldn't chop down a tree.
title: Darkout

notes: Tried using Proton 3.7, 3.7 Beta, 3.16, 3.16 Beta, and 4.2. All resulted in the ability to launch the game, create a new character and world, and enter the world. However, I am only able to see a white screen with the games HUD. If I go into the games graphics settings and turn off all the settings, I can get the white screen to go away and some of the graphics to show up, but the game is still unplayable.
title: Darkout
